title: YouTube Poop: Jawbone Of An Ass
description:
Honors: #67 Top Rated (Today) - Pets & Animals (Lawl)

There aren't a whole lot of Pinky & The Brain poops out there, are there?

As long as I have you here I might as well divulge my plan for the coming weeks. I have another poop made that I'm most proud of, but it's also pretty short, which will either be really good, be good enough to set off a series of fads, or just kinda sit there.

Then I have another YTP Melange video (My term for YTPs that are just random assorted clips with no specific focus.) and one based on a Super Mario World episode, which is my longest one yet. Expect another "music video" exhibiting my music and another ill-fitting video in between.

Peace.
